review: So we've gotten pizza from here a few times at work. They don't skimp on toppings, which I appreciated. So in terms of my personal preferences for pizza, I'm not really a doughy person. If I'm getting thin crust, I like the crust to be light and crispy. This crust was more of a doughy and chewy. The pie bottom was also a bit more on the doughy side. I personally like it a little thinner. Cheese was plentiful, and it came piping hot so all positive notes. I would say if it was available, I would eat it. I don't think I personally would go out of my way to buy it myself though.
